title: HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS REENTRY TILLAMOOK COUNTY HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter and transitional housing. Participants have access to food and clothing, assistance with applying for health insurance, and a comprehensive needs assessment process supported by a case manager. Can provide information and referrals about identification replacement, schooling, and job placement services. 6505 Headquarter Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: -Adults age 18 and older and families with children under age 18 experiencing homelessness or are re-entering the community from incarceration -Clients must not have or be under the influence of any intoxicants on-site. Individuals with a registered sex offense are not eligible. Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Emergency Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 354-8014 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 354-8014 Brianne Price Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Program entry is referral based through participating community partners. Community members cannot self-refer. Call or visit website to locate a referring agency. 211info is not a referring agency. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Ex-Offenders Community Shelters * Homeless Families Transitional Housing/Shelter Transitional Housing/Shelter * Ex-Offenders Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
